name: lootxhub-marketplace
description: Full-stack LootXHub marketplace prototype with accounts, listings, uploads, moderation, and checkout.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');const s=[...h.matchAll(/<script>([\\s\\S]*?)<\\/script>/g)].map(m=>m[1]).join('\\n');new Function(s);console.log('inline script ok')"
